# 新闻速递 2026-04-16

## Coupang
- Coupang投资1200亿韩元，扩大布局机器人和主权AI领域，驱动未来增长。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxONTFVaGJzV1hENWEwVktsNDNsWUlWQjEtSjdEaHI4bzFuMGJkakdGaDRhUTFKU21iV2ZoRXVkeDlFZDl1ZThWY1R6RmJBZ3hvRVhQTHpkQXo2NmVqeUo1eFBkTjloODRSSjVESFppMDB0dnZCUmdJUElLR3AxQlI2OENzM3BFbjVoc2pGTUxLM3pOdDROdzVXQVhET3BrdnJBMG1v?oc=5)）
- Coupang等公司股价飙升，显示市场积极信号，值得投资者关注其未来走势。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- AppLovin等公司股价飙升，显示市场对其价值的认可，吸引投资者关注。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- AppLovin股价上涨7.2%，但估值模型显示其可能被高估，投资者需审慎评估风险。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQb0xPcUxwNFp6dWhFcVRFZllPcEVYT0hYb0huR216NzFsQmsySElpTmtDLUF3blM5akd5Skk2enQyTUFQNk14UVN6SmVtZTAxYXo2X2tJbjVyY1I5dWY5T3RfeEVlOXo1R3B6RzJNdFltOWVZS1lsOWhTY0FSLUUtQ3o4QTA5czd4eFJMSjhPeG1MMkdXZU44WlVxWS1sSUt3RTB5UFpVWU44MlZXVEFUY2ln?oc=5)）
- Argus Research首次覆盖AppLovin并给予“买入”评级，有望提振市场信心和股价。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxQUzFsRVJ1US1FR2N4bkJoNGZ2NE1CYXd0LVZiajJKME5RR0o4VHUwQVJjZDJkQ3d6V3JuQkpqUXFBZjdHZ0pGLWtmWFpzSUJMZlhqY0g4YmVVUXBDdnZwcTQtOVR2OXZIenczLUlqRldMUFZqaUhUTUdHeTIyMS1wOFRrVVdQUXFUTVI0SXJISjU4RTkyWDdjTi1CQVpyVDFvX0RXcEVGaC1ZZ09VWmlFSExuVWpGTGx4NnFjVHNtOTlpemZYUHc?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre (MELI) 市场表现超越预期，展现强劲增长势头，值得投资者进一步关注。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxOU2N2aHVFaUVfc21nc242eU95S3BZcDQ5VjdhUDQtenpwVVc3NEVuWlV6X042Vy1kRUFwcWRnblhIUU9Qa1BDRV84NkJYM2h3ZDJiMXZmTGdTck9XblJtdnlwTGRwNEZ2UTFpT180ZkJrbTQtWDEzeEJTZVpHNnlyQWpMNmpRXzVZX3dsS2VQcUp0SFBjNmhQQlU0TjloclgwMzMwX19iWmI?oc=5)）

## Shopee
- Shopee菲律宾站点销售萨克斯风笛，凸显其电商平台商品多样性，满足新手音乐爱好者需求。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxNeXl0N2c3aDFMQVpURzJ1eVJfejNDa3hqc3JST2pZRE1kUWwtSG5KRWhZdGI3Tm5mc3dZNmFTMUQtcENVcldtR3UybkxXUEtaXzN5dnV3dTJLXzRuanZyeWNqTHpucUVocUVCZ3AwTHpWN052bnZOQlJ0aEdUNWY2dloxaEZfTDlMVlBQQWhR?oc=5)）
